provider.label: AI provider
provider.ollamaEmpty: No models found — make sure Ollama is running
provider.compatEmpty: No models found — check the server is running and the address (e.g. http://localhost:1234/v1)

preset.fastDesc: Great for simple packs that are mostly lang files. Minimal validation.
preset.balancedDesc: Quests, guidebooks, lang files — anything. Validation + 1 retry.
preset.bestDesc: Story and roleplay packs. Double validation + a context review pass.

recommend.title: OpenRouter · DeepSeek V4 Flash
recommend.sub: Best-value combo · about {{cost}} for this pack — a conservative figure; cache hits usually bring it lower
recommend.subNoScan: Best-value combo · one key for every model, lowest list price with the deepest cache discount

advanced.thinkingHint: Enables reasoning on capable models (Claude, o-series, OpenRouter reasoning) — better quality, slower and pricier
